title: Shulker Shell Crafting
description: Minecraft mod that allows you to craft Shulker Shells!
body:
**📦 Shulker Shell Crafting**

Shulker Shell Crafting adds a simple and balanced way to obtain shulker shells without endless End City hunting.

With this mod installed, you can craft Shulker Shells using materials from the End and a valuable overworld resource:

🟣 5× Popped Chorus Fruit

💎 1× Diamond

This keeps shulker shells rare and progression-friendly, while making storage upgrades more accessible for survival players.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27d8c0e5da9ea4a4ec38bd286f9bb0db5f446019.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

Adds a new crafting recipe for Shulker Shells

Uses End-themed materials to stay vanilla-friendly

Perfect for QoL modpacks and long-term survival worlds

No changes to vanilla loot tables or mechanics

**⚖️ Balanced & Vanilla-Style**

The recipe is designed to feel fair:

Requires End access (chorus fruit)

Costs a diamond to prevent early-game abuse

Fits seamlessly into vanilla gameplay

Craft smarter. Store bigger. Explore less.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
